data.title: Boliden's Q4 2025 report to be announced on Feb 3 at 07:45 (CET), followed by a conference at 09:30.
data.description: Boliden is set to release its Interim Report for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 3, 2026, at 07:45 (CET). A press conference and analyst briefing are scheduled for the same day at 09:30 and will be accessible through webcast and telephone. This financial update provides insights into the company's performance during a crucial period, and stakeholders are keenly anticipating the figures and analyses presented.

data.title: Ditto appoints Wendy R. Anderson as Senior Strategic Advisor for Public Sector operations platform.
data.description: Atlanta-based technology company, Ditto, has appointed Wendy R. Anderson as Senior Strategic Advisor for the Public Sector division. Ditto is known for its software platform designed to support uninterrupted operations, specifically for mission-critical applications. The platform ensures functionality even in the face of latency, outages, and disconnections across various devices and cloud services. It caters to global enterprises and public sector units functioning in environments with limited connectivity. Wendy R. Anderson's new role aims to enhance Ditto's support for public sector teams facing connectivity challenges.

data.title: Choura Events expands into Northern California amid Monterey County's hospitality boom. Jan 13, 2026.
data.description: In Monterey, California, on January 13, 2026, Choura Events is making a significant move to establish a stronger foothold in Northern California. This expansion aligns with Monterey County's growing status as a top spot for hospitality, motorsports, and cultural gatherings. The company aims to prioritize partnerships within the community as it expands its operations northward.

data.title: Cannaspire introduces Cannabis & Hemp Expert Witness and Testing Lab Consulting as industry shifts to Schedule III.
data.description: A prominent global cannabis consulting firm based in Phoenixville, Pennsylvania, called Cannaspire, has introduced new services involving Cannabis and Hemp Expert Witness and Testing Laboratory Consulting. This move aims to enhance its scientific, regulatory, and litigation support offerings during a critical period for the cannabis and hemp sectors. With cannabis shifting from Schedule I to Schedule III as per federal law, various industry stakeholders are encountering heightened regulatory scrutiny and more extensive legal actions.

data.title: Pelican launches Aegis 25L Tactical Backpack in MultiCam® at SHOT Show 2026 for tactical enthusiasts.
data.description: Pelican, a renowned brand for mission-critical protective gear, unveiled the Aegis™ 25L Tactical Backpack in Torrance, California, on January 13, 2026. This durable backpack is the latest addition to the Aegis ecosystem and is tailored for tactical enthusiasts. Available exclusively at Pelican, this new backpack is designed to meet the needs of individuals in high-stakes situations.

data.title: Update on Adtalem Global Education and Trex Company in BetterInvesting™ Magazine. Stock valuation of ATGE under scrutiny.
data.description: A recent report by Adtalem Global Education Inc. from Troy, Michigan, has prompted investors to question the fair valuation of the company's stock. Investors are curious if the stock is currently within a buy range. The Editorial Advisory and Securities Review Committee of BetterInvesting Magazine is closely examining Adtalem to determine its standing in the market. The report was released on January 13, 2026, by PRNewswire.

data.title: Main Street Capital exits investments in KBK Industries, generates $17.3M gain; fully exited its debt and equity investments.
data.description: Main Street Capital Corporation (NYSE: MAIN) has announced a realized gain of $17.3 million from its exit of equity investment in KBK Industries, LLC. The exit involved fully divesting from debt and equity investments in KBK. The announcement was made in Houston on January 13, 2026.
EU's Von der Leyen: Further sanctions against Iran will be swiftly proposed

data.title: Wi-Fi pioneer Rick Bahr joins Edgewater Wireless as strategic advisor, bringing expertise in semiconductor industry.
data.description: Edgewater Wireless Systems Inc., a leader in AI-powered Wi-Fi Spectrum Slicing™ technology for residential, enterprise, and Industrial IoT markets, has welcomed Rick Bahr, a prominent Wi-Fi semiconductor executive, as a strategic advisor. This announcement comes as Edgewater Wireless (TSXV: YFI) (OTC: KPIFF) aims to enhance its expertise in the field. Brian Imrie, the Board Chair of Edgewater Wireless, expressed admiration for Bahr, noting his esteemed reputation in the Wi-Fi silicon industry with experience at notable companies like Atheros, Qualcomm, and Stanford.

data.title: Dollar Tree appoints Daniel Delrosario as Senior VP of Investor Relations and Treasurer. (Note: The summary focuses on the main point of the article mentioning the appointment of Daniel Delrosario to the position at Dollar Tree, Inc.)
data.description: Chesapeake-based Dollar Tree, Inc. revealed that Daniel Delrosario is now the Senior VP of Investor Relations and Treasurer starting today. As part of the finance team, his responsibilities encompass managing investor relations and treasury functions, such as capital market strategies, liquidity oversight, and interaction with investors. Delrosario will report directly to Stewart Glendinning, the Chief Financial Officer of the company. Dollar Tree, Inc. operates under the NASDAQ symbol DLTR.

data.title: National Vision reaffirms fiscal 2025 outlook at ICR Conference: 32 new stores, 5.0%-6.0% sales growth, $1.97B-$1.99B revenue, $92M-$98M income.
data.description: DULUTH, Ga.--National Vision Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: EYE) confirmed its fiscal 2025 forecast before attending the 2026 ICR Conference. The outlook for fiscal 2025 includes approximately 32 new stores, Adjusted Comparable Store Sales Growth expected to be between 5.0% and 6.0%, Net Revenue projected to fall within the range of $1.970 billion to $1.988 billion, and Adjusted Operating Income estimated to be between $92 million and $98 million.

data.title: HEINZ introduces the HEINZ Dipper, a fry box with built-in ketchup compartment in 11 countries.
data.description: In Pittsburgh and Chicago, a recent press release highlights the introduction of a groundbreaking product by HEINZ, recognized worldwide for its condiments. The company unveiled the HEINZ Dipper, a unique fry box equipped with a built-in ketchup section, allowing for convenient on-the-go dipping. This innovation addresses the common dilemma faced by fry enthusiasts seeking to enjoy their favorite combination without hassle. The new product, designed for fry and ketchup aficionados, features a patent-pending design that streamlines the dipping experience.

data.title: Students, parents, and teachers will gather at North Dakota Capitol on Jan. 27 to celebrate school choice, organized by School Choice Week.
data.description: In Bismarck, North Dakota on January 27, 2026, hundreds of students, parents, and teachers will gather at the Capitol to commemorate school choice in the state. This celebration marks an important opportunity for individuals to support educational options.

data.title: Armata Pharmaceuticals to advance AP-SA02 to Phase 3 after FDA meeting. First bacteriophage company to reach this stage.
data.description: The FDA has approved the progression of AP-SA02 to a Phase 3 study based on data from the Phase 2a diSArm study. Armata Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NYSE American: ARMP) from Los Angeles has become the first bacteriophage company to reach this stage. The announcement was made on January 13, 2026.

data.title: Keeper Security strengthens cyber defenses for Atlassian Williams F1 Team with KeeperPAM, enforcing zero-trust security globally.
data.description: The Atlassian Williams F1 Team is utilizing Keeper Security's unified, cloud-native PAM platform in Chicago to enhance security measures and streamline operations. This collaboration enables the team to enforce zero-trust security protocols and control privileged access globally. The platform is a key tool in maintaining security and efficiency for the team as they work to achieve their goals.
